title: heteropappus gouldii
intro: Heteropappus gouldii, also known as the Australian saltbush or bushy saltbush, is a shrub native to Australia that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. Heteropappus gouldii has been used to treat various health conditions, such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, due to its high content of essential oils and flavonoids. Herbal preparations of the plant, including teas and infusions, have been used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
